final.sql:
WITH sales_returns AS (
    SELECT 
        'store' AS channel,
        ss.ss_store_sk AS id,
        ss.ss_sold_date_sk AS date_sk,
        ss.ss_ext_sales_price AS sales,
        0 AS returns_,
        (ss.ss_ext_sales_price - ss.ss_ext_wholesale_cost) AS profit
    FROM store_sales ss
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        'store' AS channel,
        sr.sr_store_sk AS id,
        sr.sr_returned_date_sk AS date_sk,
        0 AS sales,
        sr.sr_return_amt AS returns_,
